text: mama are we still doing dinner sunday? i was thinking maybe i can bring dessert 🍮
Eli yes of course!! I'm making arroz con pollo 😊 bring the flan from that bakery you like
omg yes!! I'll be there by 5, love you ❤️
Eli!! just checking on you, haven't heard from you since tuesday 😟
omg mami sorry been swamped with work. I'm good I promise!! how are you and dad?
we're fine mija just miss you 🥺 come eat with us sunday ok?
Eli!! still on for our call Sunday? 3pm your time?
yes omg I've been waiting all week 😭 3pm works perfectly
okayyyy setting a reminder rn. love youuu 🥹
eli!! are you free friday night? thinking we do dinner and maybe go out after 🥂
omg yes finally!! where were you thinking? i'm down for anything honestly
lol okay let me ask the others and i'll make a res somewhere good, just keep it open 🙌
Eli!! tu mamá subió las fotos del domingo al grupo familiar y yo salgo con los ojos cerrados en TODAS 😭
jajajaja ay primo no seas dramático, a mí me salió la boca llena de pastel 💀 somos un desastre
JAJAJA ok empate, pero que alguien le diga a tía Rosa que no suba más sin avisar 😭🙏
Eli!! passed my math exam 😭🙏 told you I'd study
MATEO omg finally!! I knew you could do it 🥹 what'd you get??
87!! ok not perfect but still lol dinner's on you this weekend right 😂
mama are we still on for ropa vieja sunday? i can help chop
coach moved volleyball to 3 on Thu, can you do pickup?
SAT prep at bayshore saturday 10-12, need a ride after
